message:
test(harness,render): golden reflow tests and orphan continuation repro

New test files:

crates/ftui-harness/tests/golden_reflow.rs:
- Golden test infrastructure for reflow behavior verification
- Tests layout recalculation on terminal resize events
- Captures buffer state before/after resize for comparison

crates/ftui-harness/tests/reflow_snapshots.rs:
- Snapshot-based testing for reflow edge cases
- Validates consistent rendering across size transitions
- Uses insta for snapshot management

crates/ftui-render/tests/repro_orphan_continuation.rs:
- Reproduction test for orphan continuation cell bug
- Validates fix from buffer.rs blit_region change
- Documents the edge case where wide chars are split at region boundaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
